name: nai
description: NAI — AI support agent that reads your docs and your live data, and files tickets into your own tools.

scripts.dev: concurrently "npm run dev -w apps/api" "npm run dev -w apps/admin" "npm run dev -w apps/widget" "npm run dev -w apps/site"
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck -w apps/api && npm run typecheck -w apps/admin && npm run typecheck -w apps/widget
